mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_week_menu
idx, menu_date, content, type, update_dt, reg_dt, del_yn, user_id,
VALUES
#{idx}, DATE_FORMAT(#{menu_date}, '%Y-%m-%d'), #{content}, #{type}, DATE_FORMAT(now(), '%Y-%m-%d'), DATE_FORMAT(#{reg_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d'), #{del_yn}, #{user_id},
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
idx=#{idx}, menu_date=DATE_FORMAT(#{menu_date}, '%Y-%m-%d'), content=#{content}, type=#{type}, update_dt=DATE_FORMAT(now(), '%Y-%m-%d'), reg_dt=DATE_FORMAT(#{reg_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d'), del_yn=#{del_yn}, user_id=#{user_id},
mapper.select: SELECT idx, DATE_FORMAT(menu_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as menu_date, content, type, del_yn, update_dt, reg_dt, user_id FROM tb_week_menu WHERE DATE_FORMAT(menu_date, '%Y-%m') = CONCAT(#{year},'-',#{month}) AND type = #{type} AND del_yn = 'N'

SELECT idx, DATE_FORMAT(menu_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as menu_date, content, type, del_yn, update_dt, reg_dt, user_id FROM tb_week_menu WHERE DATE_FORMAT(menu_date, '%Y-%m-%d') = #{today} AND type = #{type} AND del_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_week_menu
idx, menu_date, end_date, content, type, update_dt, reg_dt, del_yn, user_id, account_id,
VALUES
#{idx}, DATE_FORMAT(#{menu_date}, '%Y-%m-%d'), DATE_FORMAT(#{end_date}, '%Y-%m-%d'), #{content}, #{type}, DATE_FORMAT(now(), '%Y-%m-%d'), DATE_FORMAT(#{reg_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d'), #{del_yn}, #{user_id}, #{account_id},
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
idx=#{idx}, menu_date=DATE_FORMAT(#{menu_date}, '%Y-%m-%d'), end_date=DATE_FORMAT(#{end_date}, '%Y-%m-%d'), content=#{content}, type=#{type}, update_dt=DATE_FORMAT(now(), '%Y-%m-%d'), reg_dt=DATE_FORMAT(#{reg_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d'), del_yn=#{del_yn}, user_id=#{user_id}, account_id=#{account_id},
mapper.select: SELECT idx, DATE_FORMAT(menu_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as menu_date, DATE_FORMAT(end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') as end_date, content, type, del_yn, DATE_FORMAT(update_dt, '%Y-%m-%d') as update_dt, DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d') as reg_dt, user_id, account_id FROM tb_week_menu WHERE DATE_FORMAT(menu_date, '%Y-%m') = CONCAT(#{year},'-',#{month}) AND del_yn = 'N' AND type != 1

SELECT a.account_id , a.account_name , adn.diner_date , ifnull(adn.total,0) as total FROM tb_account a LEFT OUTER JOIN tb_account_diners_number adn ON adn.account_id = a.account_id AND adn.diner_year = #{year} AND adn.diner_month = #{month} AND a.del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY a.account_id, diner_date ASC
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tb_account_managerment_table ( account_id, year, month, living_estimate, living_estimate_ratio, basic_estimate, basic_estimate_ratio,
living_cost2, living_ratio2, basic_cost2, basic_ratio2, employ_cost2, employ_ratio2,
living_cost, living_ratio, basic_cost, basic_ratio, employ_cost, employ_ratio, daycare_cost, daycare_ratio, daycare_emp_cost, daycare_emp_ratio, payback_price, payback_ratio, duty_secure, duty_secure_ratio, food_process, food_trash_ratio, dishwasher, dishwasher_ratio, cesco, cesco_ratio, water_puri, water_ratio, utility_bills, utility_ratio, utility_bills_note, food_cost, food_ratio, etc_cost, etc_ratio, estimate_total, estimate_total_ratio, dispatch_cost, dispatch_ratio, person_cost, person_ratio, sales_total, sales_total_ratio, purchase_total, purchase_total_ratio, person_total, person_total_ratio, indirect_total, indirect_total_ratio, business_profit, business_profit_ratio, update_dt, event_cost, event_ratio, not_budget_cost, not_budget_ratio, etc_indirect_cost, etc_indirect_ratio, integrity_cost, integrity_ratio, return_cost, return_ratio ) VALUES ( #{account_id}, #{year}, #{month}, #{living_estimate}, #{living_estimate_ratio}, #{basic_estimate}, #{basic_estimate_ratio},
#{living_cost2}, #{living_ratio2}, #{basic_cost2}, #{basic_ratio2}, #{employ_cost2}, #{employ_ratio2},
#{living_cost}, #{living_ratio}, #{basic_cost}, #{basic_ratio}, #{employ_cost}, #{employ_ratio}, #{daycare_cost}, #{daycare_ratio}, #{daycare_emp_cost}, #{daycare_emp_ratio}, #{payback_price}, #{payback_ratio}, #{duty_secure}, #{duty_secure_ratio}, #{food_process}, #{food_trash_ratio}, #{dishwasher}, #{dishwasher_ratio}, #{cesco}, #{cesco_ratio}, #{water_puri}, #{water_ratio}, #{utility_bills}, #{utility_ratio}, #{utility_bills_note}, #{food_cost}, #{food_ratio}, #{etc_cost}, #{etc_ratio}, #{estimate_total}, #{estimate_total_ratio}, #{dispatch_cost}, #{dispatch_ratio}, #{person_cost}, #{person_ratio}, #{sales_total}, #{sales_total_ratio}, #{purchase_total}, #{purchase_total_ratio}, #{person_total}, #{person_total_ratio}, #{indirect_total}, #{indirect_total_ratio}, #{business_profit}, #{business_profit_ratio}, CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00'), #{event_cost}, #{event_ratio}, #{not_budget_cost}, #{not_budget_ratio}, #{etc_indirect_cost}, #{etc_indirect_ratio}, #{integrity_cost}, #{integrity_ratio}, #{return_cost}, #{return_ratio} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE
living_estimate = #{living_estimate},
living_estimate_ratio = #{living_estimate_ratio},
basic_estimate = #{basic_estimate},
basic_estimate_ratio = #{basic_estimate_ratio},
living_cost2 = #{living_cost2},
living_ratio2 = #{living_ratio2},
basic_cost2 = #{basic_cost2},
basic_ratio2 = #{basic_ratio2},
employ_cost2 = #{employ_cost2},
employ_ratio2 = #{employ_ratio2},
living_cost = #{living_cost},
living_ratio = #{living_ratio},
basic_cost = #{basic_cost},
basic_ratio = #{basic_ratio},
employ_cost = #{employ_cost},
employ_ratio = #{employ_ratio},
daycare_cost = #{daycare_cost},
daycare_ratio = #{daycare_ratio},
daycare_emp_cost = #{daycare_emp_cost},
daycare_emp_ratio = #{daycare_emp_ratio},
payback_price = #{payback_price},
payback_ratio = #{payback_ratio},
duty_secure = #{duty_secure},
duty_secure_ratio = #{duty_secure_ratio},
food_process = #{food_process},
food_trash_ratio = #{food_trash_ratio},
dishwasher = #{dishwasher},
dishwasher_ratio = #{dishwasher_ratio},
cesco = #{cesco},
cesco_ratio = #{cesco_ratio},
water_puri = #{water_puri},
water_ratio = #{water_ratio},
utility_bills = #{utility_bills},
utility_ratio = #{utility_ratio},
utility_bills_note = #{utility_bills_note},
food_cost = #{food_cost},
food_ratio = #{food_ratio},
etc_cost = #{etc_cost},
etc_ratio = #{etc_ratio},
estimate_total = #{estimate_total},
estimate_total_ratio = #{estimate_total_ratio},
dispatch_cost = #{dispatch_cost},
dispatch_ratio = #{dispatch_ratio},
person_cost = #{person_cost},
person_ratio = #{person_ratio},
sales_total = #{sales_total},
sales_total_ratio = #{sales_total_ratio},
purchase_total = #{purchase_total},
purchase_total_ratio = #{purchase_total_ratio},
person_total = #{person_total},
person_total_ratio = #{person_total_ratio},
indirect_total = #{indirect_total},
indirect_total_ratio = #{indirect_total_ratio},
business_profit = #{business_profit},
business_profit_ratio = #{business_profit_ratio},
update_dt = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00'),
event_cost = #{event_cost},
event_ratio = #{event_ratio},
not_budget_cost = #{not_budget_cost},
not_budget_ratio = #{not_budget_ratio},
etc_indirect_cost = #{etc_indirect_cost},
etc_indirect_ratio = #{etc_indirect_ratio},
integrity_cost = #{integrity_cost},
integrity_ratio = #{integrity_ratio},
return_cost = #{return_cost},
return_ratio = #{return_ratio},

choose.when:
SELECT 'TOTAL' AS account_id, year, month, -- [1. 식수 추정치 및 비율] living_estimate, basic_estimate, (living_estimate + basic_estimate) AS estimate_total, ROUND(IFNULL(living_estimate / NULLIF(living_estimate + basic_estimate, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS living_estimate_ratio, ROUND(IFNULL(basic_estimate / NULLIF(living_estimate + basic_estimate, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS basic_estimate_ratio, ROUND(IFNULL((living_estimate + basic_estimate) / NULLIF(living_estimate + basic_estimate, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS estimate_total_ratio,
-- [2. 매출 항목 및 비율 (Sales)] living_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS living_ratio, basic_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS basic_ratio, employ_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS employ_ratio,
living_cost2, ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS living_ratio2, basic_cost2, ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS basic_ratio2, employ_cost2, ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS employ_ratio2,
daycare_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS daycare_ratio, daycare_emp_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS daycare_emp_ratio, integrity_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(integrity_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS integrity_ratio, payback_price, ROUND(IFNULL(payback_price / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS payback_ratio, return_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(return_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS return_ratio, sales_total,
ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(integrity_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(payback_price / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + + ROUND(IFNULL(return_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS sales_total_ratio,
-- ROUND(IFNULL(sales_total / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS sales_total_ratio,
-- [3. 매입 항목 및 비율 (Purchase)] food_process, ROUND(IFNULL(food_process / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS food_trash_ratio, dishwasher, ROUND(IFNULL(dishwasher / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS dishwasher_ratio, cesco, ROUND(IFNULL(cesco / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS cesco_ratio, water_puri, ROUND(IFNULL(water_puri / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS water_ratio, food_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(food_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS food_ratio, etc_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(etc_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS etc_ratio, event_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(event_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS event_ratio, not_budget_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(not_budget_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS not_budget_ratio,
purchase_total, ROUND(IFNULL(purchase_total / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS purchase_total_ratio,
-- [4. 인건비 항목 및 비율 (Labor)] person_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(person_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS person_ratio, dispatch_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(dispatch_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS dispatch_ratio, (person_cost + dispatch_cost) AS person_total, ROUND(IFNULL((person_cost + dispatch_cost) / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS person_total_ratio,
-- [5. 간접비 및 기타 (Indirect)] utility_bills, etc_indirect_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(etc_indirect_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS etc_indirect_ratio, ROUND(IFNULL(utility_bills / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS utility_ratio, ROUND(sales_total * 0.1, 0) AS duty_secure, 10.0 AS duty_secure_ratio, (utility_bills + ROUND(sales_total * 0.1, 0)) AS indirect_total, ROUND(IFNULL((utility_bills + (sales_total * 0.1)) / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS indirect_total_ratio,
-- [6. 영업이익 (Profit)] (sales_total - purchase_total - (person_cost + dispatch_cost) - (utility_bills + ROUND(sales_total * 0.1, 0))) AS business_profit, ROUND(IFNULL((sales_total - purchase_total - (person_cost + dispatch_cost) - (utility_bills + ROUND(sales_total * 0.1, 0))) / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS business_profit_ratio,
-- [7. 기존 기타 항목들] utility_bills_note, not_budget_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(not_budget_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS not_budget_ratio, etc_indirect_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(etc_indirect_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS etc_indirect_ratio, update_dt
FROM ( SELECT year, month, -- 매출 기초 데이터 SUM(IFNULL(living_cost, 0)) AS living_cost, SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost, 0)) AS basic_cost, SUM(IFNULL(employ_cost, 0)) AS employ_cost,
SUM(IFNULL(living_cost2, 0)) AS living_cost2, SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost2, 0)) AS basic_cost2, SUM(IFNULL(employ_cost2, 0)) AS employ_cost2,
SUM(IFNULL(daycare_cost, 0)) AS daycare_cost, SUM(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost, 0)) AS daycare_emp_cost, SUM(IFNULL(payback_price, 0)) AS payback_price, SUM(IFNULL(integrity_cost, 0)) AS integrity_cost, SUM(IFNULL(return_cost, 0)) AS return_cost, -- 매입 기초 데이터 SUM(IFNULL(food_process, 0)) AS food_process, SUM(IFNULL(dishwasher, 0)) AS dishwasher, SUM(IFNULL(cesco, 0)) AS cesco, SUM(IFNULL(water_puri, 0)) AS water_puri, SUM(IFNULL(food_cost, 0)) AS food_cost, SUM(IFNULL(etc_cost, 0)) AS etc_cost, SUM(IFNULL(event_cost, 0)) AS event_cost, SUM(IFNULL(not_budget_cost, 0)) AS not_budget_cost, -- 인건비 및 기타 SUM(IFNULL(person_cost, 0)) AS person_cost, SUM(IFNULL(dispatch_cost, 0)) AS dispatch_cost, SUM(IFNULL(utility_bills, 0)) AS utility_bills, SUM(IFNULL(duty_secure, 0)) AS duty_secure, SUM(IFNULL(etc_indirect_cost, 0)) AS etc_indirect_cost,
-- 공통 합계(상수처럼 사용하기 위해 서브쿼리에서 계산) (SUM(IFNULL(living_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(employ_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(living_cost2, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost2, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(employ_cost2, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(daycare_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(payback_price, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(integrity_cost, 0))) AS sales_total,
(SUM(IFNULL(food_process, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(dishwasher, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(cesco, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(water_puri, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(food_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(etc_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(event_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(not_budget_cost, 0))) AS purchase_total,
-- 식수 추정치 로직 (필요시 내부 변수/상수 적용) ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(living_cost, 0)) / 30 / 5000, 1) AS living_estimate, ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost, 0)) / 30 / 5000, 1) AS basic_estimate,
MAX(utility_bills_note) AS utility_bills_note, MAX(DATE_FORMAT(update_dt, '%Y-%m-%d')) AS update_dt FROM the_full.tb_account_managerment_table WHERE year = #{year}
AND month = #{month}
AND account_id not in ( 20260122065002, -- 한결 주간보호 20260122071337, -- 어르신사랑 주간보호 20260122071857, -- 청평설악 주간보호 20260122072114, -- 늘사랑(부천) 주간보호 20260122072245, -- 지안 주간보호 20260122072732, -- 사랑의 주간보호 20260219024021, -- 사랑복지센터 20260122072529 -- 인천강남 -- 20260210044430, KDB생명 데이케어센터 고양 -- 20250819193617, 참인지재활주간보호 -- 20250819193613, 대교뉴이프(마음고향2호점) -- 20250819193535 마음고향 ) GROUP BY year, month ) AS aggregated_data ORDER BY year ASC, month ASC

SELECT T.account_id, T.account_name, year, month, -- [1. 식수 추정치 및 비율] living_estimate, basic_estimate, (living_estimate + basic_estimate) AS estimate_total, ROUND(IFNULL(living_estimate / NULLIF(living_estimate + basic_estimate, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS living_estimate_ratio, ROUND(IFNULL(basic_estimate / NULLIF(living_estimate + basic_estimate, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS basic_estimate_ratio, ROUND(IFNULL((living_estimate + basic_estimate) / NULLIF(living_estimate + basic_estimate, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS estimate_total_ratio,
-- [2. 매출 항목 및 비율 (Sales)] living_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS living_ratio, basic_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS basic_ratio, employ_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS employ_ratio,
living_cost2, ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS living_ratio2, basic_cost2, ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS basic_ratio2, employ_cost2, ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS employ_ratio2,
daycare_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS daycare_ratio, daycare_emp_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS daycare_emp_ratio, integrity_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(integrity_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS integrity_ratio, payback_price, ROUND(IFNULL(payback_price / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS payback_ratio, sales_total,
ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(integrity_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(payback_price / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS sales_total_ratio,
-- ROUND(IFNULL(sales_total / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS sales_total_ratio,
-- [3. 매입 항목 및 비율 (Purchase)] food_process, ROUND(IFNULL(food_process / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS food_trash_ratio, dishwasher, ROUND(IFNULL(dishwasher / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS dishwasher_ratio, cesco, ROUND(IFNULL(cesco / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS cesco_ratio, water_puri, ROUND(IFNULL(water_puri / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS water_ratio, food_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(food_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS food_ratio, etc_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(etc_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS etc_ratio, event_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(event_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS event_ratio, not_budget_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(not_budget_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS not_budget_ratio,
purchase_total, ROUND(IFNULL(purchase_total / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS purchase_total_ratio,
-- [4. 인건비 항목 및 비율 (Labor)] person_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(person_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS person_ratio, dispatch_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(dispatch_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS dispatch_ratio, (person_cost + dispatch_cost) AS person_total, ROUND(IFNULL((person_cost + dispatch_cost) / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS person_total_ratio,
-- [5. 간접비 및 기타 (Indirect)] utility_bills, etc_indirect_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(etc_indirect_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS etc_indirect_ratio, ROUND(IFNULL(utility_bills / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS utility_ratio, ROUND(sales_total * 0.1, 0) AS duty_secure, 10.0 AS duty_secure_ratio, (utility_bills + ROUND(sales_total * 0.1, 0)) AS indirect_total, ROUND(IFNULL((utility_bills + (sales_total * 0.1)) / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS indirect_total_ratio,
-- [6. 영업이익 (Profit)] (sales_total - purchase_total - (person_cost + dispatch_cost) - (utility_bills + ROUND(sales_total * 0.1, 0))) AS business_profit, ROUND(IFNULL((sales_total - purchase_total - (person_cost + dispatch_cost) - (utility_bills + ROUND(sales_total * 0.1, 0))) / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS business_profit_ratio,
-- [7. 기존 기타 항목들] utility_bills_note, not_budget_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(not_budget_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS not_budget_ratio, etc_indirect_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(etc_indirect_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS etc_indirect_ratio, update_dt
FROM ( SELECT account_id, year, month, -- 매출 기초 데이터 SUM(IFNULL(living_cost2, 0)) AS living_cost2, SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost2, 0)) AS basic_cost2, SUM(IFNULL(employ_cost2, 0)) AS employ_cost2, SUM(IFNULL(living_cost, 0)) AS living_cost, SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost, 0)) AS basic_cost, SUM(IFNULL(employ_cost, 0)) AS employ_cost, SUM(IFNULL(daycare_cost, 0)) AS daycare_cost, SUM(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost, 0)) AS daycare_emp_cost, SUM(IFNULL(payback_price, 0)) AS payback_price, SUM(IFNULL(integrity_cost, 0)) AS integrity_cost, -- 매입 기초 데이터 SUM(IFNULL(food_process, 0)) AS food_process, SUM(IFNULL(dishwasher, 0)) AS dishwasher, SUM(IFNULL(cesco, 0)) AS cesco, SUM(IFNULL(water_puri, 0)) AS water_puri, SUM(IFNULL(food_cost, 0)) AS food_cost, SUM(IFNULL(etc_cost, 0)) AS etc_cost, SUM(IFNULL(event_cost, 0)) AS event_cost, SUM(IFNULL(not_budget_cost, 0)) AS not_budget_cost, -- 인건비 및 기타 SUM(IFNULL(person_cost, 0)) AS person_cost, SUM(IFNULL(dispatch_cost, 0)) AS dispatch_cost, SUM(IFNULL(utility_bills, 0)) AS utility_bills, SUM(IFNULL(duty_secure, 0)) AS duty_secure, SUM(IFNULL(etc_indirect_cost, 0)) AS etc_indirect_cost,
-- 공통 합계(상수처럼 사용하기 위해 서브쿼리에서 계산) (SUM(IFNULL(living_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(employ_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(living_cost2, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost2, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(employ_cost2, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(daycare_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(payback_price, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(integrity_cost, 0))) AS sales_total,
(SUM(IFNULL(food_process, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(dishwasher, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(cesco, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(water_puri, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(food_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(etc_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(event_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(not_budget_cost, 0))) AS purchase_total,
-- 식수 추정치 로직 (필요시 내부 변수/상수 적용) ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(living_cost, 0)) / 30 / 5000, 1) AS living_estimate, ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost, 0)) / 30 / 5000, 1) AS basic_estimate,
MAX(utility_bills_note) AS utility_bills_note, MAX(DATE_FORMAT(update_dt, '%Y-%m-%d')) AS update_dt FROM the_full.tb_account_managerment_table WHERE year = #{year}
AND month = #{month}
GROUP BY account_id, year, month ) AS aggregated_data JOIN tb_account T ON T.account_id = aggregated_data.account_id WHERE T.account_id not in ( 20260122065002, -- 한결 주간보호 20260122071337, -- 어르신사랑 주간보호 20260122071857, -- 청평설악 주간보호 20260122072114, -- 늘사랑(부천) 주간보호 20260122072245, -- 지안 주간보호 20260122072732, -- 사랑의 주간보호 20260219024021, -- 사랑복지센터 20260122072529 -- 인천강남 -- 20260210044430, KDB생명 데이케어센터 고양 -- 20250819193617, 참인지재활주간보호 -- 20250819193613, 대교뉴이프(마음고향2호점) -- 20250819193535 마음고향 ) ORDER BY year ASC, month ASC

mapper.select:
SELECT T.account_id, T.account_name, -- year, -- month, -- [1. 식수 추정치 및 비율] living_estimate, basic_estimate, (living_estimate + basic_estimate) AS estimate_total, ROUND(IFNULL(living_estimate / NULLIF(living_estimate + basic_estimate, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS living_estimate_ratio, ROUND(IFNULL(basic_estimate / NULLIF(living_estimate + basic_estimate, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS basic_estimate_ratio, ROUND(IFNULL((living_estimate + basic_estimate) / NULLIF(living_estimate + basic_estimate, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS estimate_total_ratio,
-- [2. 매출 항목 및 비율 (Sales)] living_cost2, ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS living_ratio2, basic_cost2, ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS basic_ratio2, employ_cost2, ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS employ_ratio2,
living_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS living_ratio, basic_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS basic_ratio, employ_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS employ_ratio, daycare_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS daycare_ratio, daycare_emp_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS daycare_emp_ratio, integrity_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(integrity_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS integrity_ratio, payback_price, ROUND(IFNULL(payback_price / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS payback_ratio, sales_total,
ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost2 / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(living_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(basic_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(employ_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(integrity_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) + ROUND(IFNULL(payback_price / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS sales_total_ratio,
-- ROUND(IFNULL(sales_total / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS sales_total_ratio,
-- [3. 매입 항목 및 비율 (Purchase)] food_process, ROUND(IFNULL(food_process / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS food_trash_ratio, dishwasher, ROUND(IFNULL(dishwasher / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS dishwasher_ratio, cesco, ROUND(IFNULL(cesco / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS cesco_ratio, water_puri, ROUND(IFNULL(water_puri / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS water_ratio, food_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(food_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS food_ratio, etc_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(etc_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS etc_ratio, event_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(event_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS event_ratio, not_budget_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(not_budget_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS not_budget_ratio,
purchase_total, ROUND(IFNULL(purchase_total / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS purchase_total_ratio,
-- [4. 인건비 항목 및 비율 (Labor)] person_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(person_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS person_ratio, dispatch_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(dispatch_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS dispatch_ratio, (person_cost + dispatch_cost) AS person_total, ROUND(IFNULL((person_cost + dispatch_cost) / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS person_total_ratio,
-- [5. 간접비 및 기타 (Indirect)] utility_bills, etc_indirect_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(etc_indirect_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS etc_indirect_ratio, ROUND(IFNULL(utility_bills / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS utility_ratio, ROUND(sales_total * 0.1, 0) AS duty_secure, 10.0 AS duty_secure_ratio, (utility_bills + ROUND(sales_total * 0.1, 0)) AS indirect_total, ROUND(IFNULL((utility_bills + (sales_total * 0.1)) / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS indirect_total_ratio,
-- [6. 영업이익 (Profit)] (sales_total - purchase_total - (person_cost + dispatch_cost) - (utility_bills + ROUND(sales_total * 0.1, 0))) AS business_profit, ROUND(IFNULL((sales_total - purchase_total - (person_cost + dispatch_cost) - (utility_bills + ROUND(sales_total * 0.1, 0))) / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS business_profit_ratio,
-- [7. 기존 기타 항목들] utility_bills_note, not_budget_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(not_budget_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS not_budget_ratio, etc_indirect_cost, ROUND(IFNULL(etc_indirect_cost / NULLIF(sales_total, 0) * 100, 0), 1) AS etc_indirect_ratio, update_dt
FROM ( SELECT account_id, year, -- 매출 기초 데이터 SUM(IFNULL(living_cost2, 0)) AS living_cost2, SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost2, 0)) AS basic_cost2, SUM(IFNULL(employ_cost2, 0)) AS employ_cost2,
SUM(IFNULL(living_cost, 0)) AS living_cost, SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost, 0)) AS basic_cost, SUM(IFNULL(employ_cost, 0)) AS employ_cost, SUM(IFNULL(daycare_cost, 0)) AS daycare_cost, SUM(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost, 0)) AS daycare_emp_cost, SUM(IFNULL(payback_price, 0)) AS payback_price, SUM(IFNULL(integrity_cost, 0)) AS integrity_cost, -- 매입 기초 데이터 SUM(IFNULL(food_process, 0)) AS food_process, SUM(IFNULL(dishwasher, 0)) AS dishwasher, SUM(IFNULL(cesco, 0)) AS cesco, SUM(IFNULL(water_puri, 0)) AS water_puri, SUM(IFNULL(food_cost, 0)) AS food_cost, SUM(IFNULL(etc_cost, 0)) AS etc_cost, SUM(IFNULL(event_cost, 0)) AS event_cost, SUM(IFNULL(not_budget_cost, 0)) AS not_budget_cost, -- 인건비 및 기타 SUM(IFNULL(person_cost, 0)) AS person_cost, SUM(IFNULL(dispatch_cost, 0)) AS dispatch_cost, SUM(IFNULL(utility_bills, 0)) AS utility_bills, SUM(IFNULL(duty_secure, 0)) AS duty_secure, SUM(IFNULL(etc_indirect_cost, 0)) AS etc_indirect_cost,
-- 공통 합계(상수처럼 사용하기 위해 서브쿼리에서 계산) (SUM(IFNULL(living_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(employ_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(living_cost2, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost2, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(employ_cost2, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(daycare_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(daycare_emp_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(payback_price, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(integrity_cost, 0))) AS sales_total,
(SUM(IFNULL(food_process, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(dishwasher, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(cesco, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(water_puri, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(food_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(etc_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(event_cost, 0)) + SUM(IFNULL(not_budget_cost, 0))) AS purchase_total,
-- 식수 추정치 로직 (필요시 내부 변수/상수 적용) ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(living_cost, 0)) / 30 / 5000, 1) AS living_estimate, ROUND(SUM(IFNULL(basic_cost, 0)) / 30 / 5000, 1) AS basic_estimate,
MAX(utility_bills_note) AS utility_bills_note, MAX(DATE_FORMAT(update_dt, '%Y-%m-%d')) AS update_dt FROM the_full.tb_account_managerment_table WHERE year = #{year}
AND month = #{month}
GROUP BY account_id, year ) AS aggregated_data JOIN tb_account T ON T.account_id = aggregated_data.account_id WHERE T.account_id not in ( 20260122065002, -- 한결 주간보호 20260122071337, -- 어르신사랑 주간보호 20260122071857, -- 청평설악 주간보호 20260122072114, -- 늘사랑(부천) 주간보호 20260122072245, -- 지안 주간보호 20260122072732, -- 사랑의 주간보호 20260219024021, -- 사랑복지센터 20260122072529 -- 인천강남 -- 20260210044430, KDB생명 데이케어센터 고양 -- 20250819193617, 참인지재활주간보호 -- 20250819193613, 대교뉴이프(마음고향2호점) -- 20250819193535 마음고향 ) ORDER BY year ASC

SELECT account_id, year, month, living_estimate, living_estimate_ratio, basic_estimate, basic_estimate_ratio,
living_cost2, living_ratio2, basic_cost2, basic_ratio2, employ_cost2, employ_ratio2,
living_cost, living_ratio, basic_cost, basic_ratio, employ_cost, employ_ratio, daycare_cost, daycare_ratio, daycare_emp_cost, daycare_emp_ratio, payback_price, payback_ratio, duty_secure, duty_secure_ratio, food_process, food_trash_ratio, dishwasher, dishwasher_ratio, cesco, cesco_ratio, water_puri, water_ratio, utility_bills, utility_ratio, food_cost, food_ratio, etc_cost, etc_ratio, estimate_total, estimate_total_ratio, dispatch_cost, dispatch_ratio, person_cost, person_ratio, sales_total, sales_total_ratio, purchase_total, purchase_total_ratio, person_total, person_total_ratio, indirect_total, indirect_total_ratio, business_profit, business_profit_ratio, update_dt FROM the_full.tb_account_managerment_table AND account_id not in ( 20260122065002, -- 한결 주간보호 20260122071337, -- 어르신사랑 주간보호 20260122071857, -- 청평설악 주간보호 20260122072114, -- 늘사랑(부천) 주간보호 20260122072245, -- 지안 주간보호 20260122072732, -- 사랑의 주간보호 20260219024021, -- 사랑복지센터 20260122072529 -- 인천강남 -- 20260210044430, KDB생명 데이케어센터 고양 -- 20250819193617, 참인지재활주간보호 -- 20250819193613, 대교뉴이프(마음고향2호점) -- 20250819193535 마음고향 )

SELECT doc_id, doc_type, large_type, middle_type, small_type, doc_name, approval_position FROM tb_electronic_payment_type WHERE del_yn = 'N' ORDER BY large_type ASC, middle_type ASC, small_type ASC, doc_type ASC

SELECT payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, doc_type, user_id, charge_sign, tm_sign, payer_sign, ceo_sign, status, tm_user, payer_user, ceo_user, department, DATE_FORMAT(reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS reg_dt FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment WHERE del_yn = 'N'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_headoffice_electronic_payment ( payment_id, draft_dt, start_dt, doc_type, department, status, retention_dt, access_level, user_id, charge_sign, tm_user, tm_sign, payer_user, payer_sign, ceo_user, ceo_sign, reg_dt, reg_user_id ) VALUES ( #{payment_id}, COALESCE( STR_TO_DATE(#{draft_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), STR_TO_DATE(#{draft_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') ), COALESCE( STR_TO_DATE(#{start_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), STR_TO_DATE(#{start_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE(#{draft_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), STR_TO_DATE(#{draft_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') ), #{doc_type}, #{department}, #{status}, #{retention_dt}, #{access_level}, #{user_id}, #{charge_sign}, #{tm_user}, #{tm_sign}, #{payer_user}, #{payer_sign}, #{ceo_user}, #{ceo_sign}, CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00'), #{reg_user_id} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE draft_dt = COALESCE( STR_TO_DATE(#{draft_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), STR_TO_DATE(#{draft_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') ), start_dt = COALESCE( STR_TO_DATE(#{start_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), STR_TO_DATE(#{start_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE(#{draft_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), STR_TO_DATE(#{draft_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') ), doc_type = #{doc_type}, department = #{department}, status = #{status}, retention_dt = #{retention_dt}, access_level = #{access_level}, user_id = #{user_id}, charge_sign = #{charge_sign}, tm_user = #{tm_user}, tm_sign = #{tm_sign}, payer_user = #{payer_user}, payer_sign = #{payer_sign}, ceo_user = #{ceo_user}, ceo_sign = #{ceo_sign}, reg_user_id = #{reg_user_id}
mapper.select:
SELECT ep.payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(ep.draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(ep.start_dt, ep.draft_dt), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS start_dt, ep.doc_type, IFNULL(ept.approval_position, -1) AS approval_position, ep.department, ep.status, ep.retention_dt, ep.access_level, ep.user_id, ep.reg_user_id, ep.charge_sign, ep.tm_user, ep.tm_sign, DATE_FORMAT(ep.tm_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS tm_dt, ep.payer_user, ep.payer_sign, DATE_FORMAT(ep.payer_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS payer_dt, ep.ceo_user, ep.ceo_sign, DATE_FORMAT(ep.ceo_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ceo_dt, CASE WHEN IFNULL(ep.tm_sign, '') = '3' OR IFNULL(ep.payer_sign, '') = '3' OR IFNULL(ep.ceo_sign, '') = '3' THEN '반려' WHEN (IFNULL(ep.tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ep.tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(ep.payer_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ep.payer_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(ep.ceo_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ep.ceo_sign, '') = '4') THEN '승인완료' WHEN IFNULL(ep.tm_user, '') != '' AND IFNULL(ep.tm_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4') THEN CASE WHEN IFNULL(ep.tm_sign, '') = '2' THEN '검토중(팀장)' ELSE '결재대기(팀장)' END WHEN IFNULL(ep.payer_user, '') != '' AND (IFNULL(ep.tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ep.tm_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(ep.payer_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4') THEN CASE WHEN IFNULL(ep.payer_sign, '') = '2' THEN '검토중(결재자)' ELSE '결재대기(결재자)' END WHEN IFNULL(ep.ceo_user, '') != '' AND (IFNULL(ep.tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ep.tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(ep.payer_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ep.payer_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(ep.ceo_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4') THEN CASE WHEN IFNULL(ep.ceo_sign, '') = '2' THEN '검토중(대표)' ELSE '결재대기(대표)' END ELSE '결재대기(팀장)' END AS progress_status_text, CASE WHEN ep.reg_user_id = #{user_id} THEN 'reg' WHEN ep.tm_user = #{user_id} THEN 'tm' WHEN ep.ceo_user = #{user_id} THEN 'ceo' WHEN ep.payer_user = #{user_id} THEN 'payer' ELSE '' END AS viewer_role, CASE WHEN ep.tm_user = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(ep.tm_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4') THEN 'Y' WHEN ep.payer_user = #{user_id} AND (IFNULL(ep.tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ep.tm_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(ep.payer_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4') THEN 'Y' WHEN ep.ceo_user = #{user_id} AND (IFNULL(ep.tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ep.tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(ep.payer_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ep.payer_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(ep.ceo_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4') THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END AS can_action FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment ep LEFT JOIN tb_electronic_payment_type ept ON CAST(ept.doc_type AS CHAR) = CAST(ep.doc_type AS CHAR) AND IFNULL(ept.del_yn, 'N') = 'N'
WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_user lu WHERE lu.user_id = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(lu.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND ( lu.position = 0 OR ep.reg_user_id = #{user_id} OR ep.tm_user = #{user_id} OR ep.ceo_user = #{user_id} OR ep.payer_user = #{user_id} OR (lu.position = 1 AND lu.department = ep.department) OR ( #{user_id} = 'iy1' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_headoffice_purchase_request prx WHERE prx.payment_id = ep.payment_id ) ) ) )
WHERE 1 = 0
ORDER BY ep.draft_dt DESC, ep.payment_id DESC

SELECT ep.payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(ep.draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, DATE_FORMAT(COALESCE(ep.start_dt, ep.draft_dt), '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS start_dt, ep.doc_type, IFNULL(ept.approval_position, -1) AS approval_position, ep.department, ep.status, ep.retention_dt, ep.access_level, ep.user_id, ep.reg_user_id, ep.charge_sign, ep.tm_user, ep.tm_sign, DATE_FORMAT(ep.tm_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS tm_dt, ep.payer_user, ep.payer_sign, DATE_FORMAT(ep.payer_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS payer_dt, ep.ceo_user, ep.ceo_sign, DATE_FORMAT(ep.ceo_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS ceo_dt FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment ep LEFT JOIN tb_electronic_payment_type ept ON CAST(ept.doc_type AS CHAR) = CAST(ep.doc_type AS CHAR) AND IFNULL(ept.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' WHERE ep.payment_id = #{payment_id}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_user lu WHERE lu.user_id = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(lu.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' AND ( lu.position = 0 OR ep.reg_user_id = #{user_id} OR ep.tm_user = #{user_id} OR ep.ceo_user = #{user_id} OR ep.payer_user = #{user_id} OR (lu.position = 1 AND lu.department = ep.department) OR ( #{user_id} = 'iy1' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_headoffice_purchase_request prx WHERE prx.payment_id = ep.payment_id ) ) ) )
AND 1 = 0
LIMIT 1

SELECT R.idx, R.title, R.place, R.item_name, R.qty, R.price, R.use_note, R.use_name, R.link, R.note, R.buy_yn, R.payment_note, R.content, R.amount, R.tax, R.total, R.account_number, R.biz_no, R.account_name, R.payment_type, R.payment_type_detail, R.request_dt FROM (
SELECT pr.idx, '' AS title, '' AS place, pr.item_name, pr.qty, pr.price, pr.use_note, pr.use_name, pr.link, pr.note, IFNULL(pr.buy_yn, 'N') AS buy_yn, pr.payment_note, '' AS content, NULL AS amount, NULL AS tax, NULL AS total, NULL AS account_number, NULL AS biz_no, NULL AS account_name, NULL AS payment_type, NULL AS payment_type_detail, NULL AS request_dt FROM tb_headoffice_purchase_request pr JOIN tb_headoffice_electronic_payment ep ON ep.payment_id = pr.payment_id WHERE pr.payment_id = #{payment_id}
UNION ALL
SELECT IFNULL(d.idx, 1) AS idx, d.title AS title, '' AS place, d.title AS item_name, NULL AS qty, NULL AS price, d.details AS use_note, '' AS use_name, '' AS link, d.note AS note, '' AS buy_yn, '' AS payment_note, d.details AS content, NULL AS amount, NULL AS tax, NULL AS total, NULL AS account_number, NULL AS biz_no, NULL AS account_name, NULL AS payment_type, NULL AS payment_type_detail, NULL AS request_dt FROM tb_headoffice_draft d JOIN tb_headoffice_electronic_payment ep ON ep.payment_id = d.payment_id WHERE d.payment_id = #{payment_id}
UNION ALL
SELECT IFNULL(pd.idx, 1) AS idx, pd.title AS title, pd.place AS place, pd.item_name AS item_name, pd.qty AS qty, pd.price AS price, pd.use_note AS use_note, pd.use_name AS use_name, '' AS link, '' AS note, '' AS buy_yn, '' AS payment_note, pd.content AS content, pd.amount AS amount, pd.tax AS tax, pd.total AS total, pd.account_number AS account_number, pd.biz_no AS biz_no, pd.account_name AS account_name, pd.payment_type AS payment_type, pd.payment_type_detail AS payment_type_detail, DATE_FORMAT(pd.request_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS request_dt FROM tb_headoffice_payment_doc pd JOIN tb_headoffice_electronic_payment ep ON ep.payment_id = pd.payment_id WHERE pd.payment_id = #{payment_id} ) R WHERE 1 = 1
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment ep JOIN tb_user lu ON lu.user_id = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(lu.del_yn, 'N') = 'N' WHERE ep.payment_id = #{payment_id} AND ( lu.position = 0 OR ep.reg_user_id = #{user_id} OR ep.tm_user = #{user_id} OR ep.ceo_user = #{user_id} OR ep.payer_user = #{user_id} OR (lu.position = 1 AND lu.department = ep.department) OR ( #{user_id} = 'iy1' AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM tb_headoffice_purchase_request prx WHERE prx.payment_id = ep.payment_id ) ) ) )
AND 1 = 0
ORDER BY R.idx ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_headoffice_electronic_payment SET tm_sign = #{action_status}, tm_dt = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00'), reg_read_dt = NULL, status = CASE WHEN #{action_status} = '3' OR IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '3' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '3' THEN 3 WHEN #{action_status} = '4' AND (IFNULL(ceo_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(payer_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '4') THEN 4 WHEN #{action_status} = '4' OR IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '4' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '4' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END WHERE payment_id = #{payment_id} AND tm_user = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(tm_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4')

UPDATE tb_headoffice_electronic_payment SET ceo_sign = #{action_status}, ceo_dt = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00'), reg_read_dt = NULL, tm_read_dt = NULL, payer_read_dt = NULL, status = CASE WHEN IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '3' OR #{action_status} = '3' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '3' THEN 3 WHEN (IFNULL(tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(ceo_user, '') = '' OR #{action_status} = '4') AND (IFNULL(payer_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '4') THEN 4 WHEN IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4' OR #{action_status} = '4' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '4' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END WHERE payment_id = #{payment_id} AND ceo_user = #{user_id} AND (IFNULL(tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(payer_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4')

UPDATE tb_headoffice_electronic_payment SET payer_sign = #{action_status}, payer_dt = CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00'), reg_read_dt = NULL, tm_read_dt = NULL, status = CASE WHEN IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '3' OR IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '3' OR #{action_status} = '3' THEN 3 WHEN (IFNULL(tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(ceo_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(payer_user, '') = '' OR #{action_status} = '4') THEN 4 WHEN IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4' OR IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '4' OR #{action_status} = '4' THEN 2 ELSE 1 END WHERE payment_id = #{payment_id} AND payer_user = #{user_id} AND (IFNULL(tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(payer_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4')
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM ( SELECT payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, '결재요청' AS notify_type, '전자결재 알림' AS notify_title, CONCAT('[', payment_id, '] 팀장 결재가 필요합니다.') AS notify_message FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment WHERE tm_user = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(tm_user, '') != '' AND IFNULL(tm_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4')
UNION
SELECT payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, '결재요청' AS notify_type, '전자결재 알림' AS notify_title, CONCAT('[', payment_id, '] 결재자 결재가 필요합니다.') AS notify_message FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment WHERE payer_user = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(payer_user, '') != '' AND (IFNULL(tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(payer_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4')
UNION
SELECT payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, '결재요청' AS notify_type, '전자결재 알림' AS notify_title, CONCAT('[', payment_id, '] 대표 결재가 필요합니다.') AS notify_message FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment WHERE ceo_user = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(ceo_user, '') != '' AND (IFNULL(tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(payer_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '4') AND IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') NOT IN ('3', '4')
UNION
SELECT payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, '승인' AS notify_type, '전자결재 알림' AS notify_title, CONCAT('[', payment_id, '] 결재가 승인되었습니다.') AS notify_message FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment WHERE reg_user_id = #{user_id} AND (IFNULL(tm_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(payer_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '4') AND (IFNULL(ceo_user, '') = '' OR IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '4') AND reg_read_dt IS NULL
UNION
SELECT payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, '반려' AS notify_type, '전자결재 알림' AS notify_title, CONCAT('[', payment_id, '] 결재가 반려되었습니다.') AS notify_message FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment WHERE reg_user_id = #{user_id} AND ( IFNULL(tm_sign, '') = '3' OR IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '3' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '3' ) AND reg_read_dt IS NULL
UNION
SELECT payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, '반려' AS notify_type, '전자결재 알림' AS notify_title, CONCAT('[', payment_id, '] 결재가 반려되었습니다.') AS notify_message FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment WHERE tm_user = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(tm_user, '') != '' AND ( IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '3' OR IFNULL(payer_sign, '') = '3' ) AND tm_read_dt IS NULL
UNION
SELECT payment_id, DATE_FORMAT(draft_dt, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') AS draft_dt, '반려' AS notify_type, '전자결재 알림' AS notify_title, CONCAT('[', payment_id, '] 결재가 반려되었습니다.') AS notify_message FROM tb_headoffice_electronic_payment WHERE payer_user = #{user_id} AND IFNULL(payer_user, '') != '' AND IFNULL(ceo_sign, '') = '3' AND payer_read_dt IS NULL ) AS N ORDER BY N.draft_dt DESC, N.payment_id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_headoffice_electronic_payment SET reg_read_dt = CASE WHEN reg_user_id = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} IN ('승인', '반려') THEN CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00') ELSE reg_read_dt END, tm_read_dt = CASE WHEN tm_user = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} = '반려' THEN CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00') ELSE tm_read_dt END, payer_read_dt = CASE WHEN payer_user = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} = '반려' THEN CONVERT_TZ(NOW(), '+00:00', '+09:00') ELSE payer_read_dt END WHERE payment_id = #{payment_id} AND ( (reg_user_id = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} IN ('승인', '반려')) OR (tm_user = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} = '반려') OR (payer_user = #{user_id} AND #{notify_type} = '반려') )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_headoffice_draft ( payment_id, title, details, note ) VALUES ( #{payment_id}, #{title}, #{details}, #{note} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE title = #{title}, details = #{details}, note = #{note}

INSERT INTO tb_headoffice_payment_doc ( payment_id, title, place, use_note, use_name, total, item_name, content, qty, price, amount, tax, payment_type, payment_type_detail, request_dt, account_number, biz_no, account_name ) VALUES ( #{payment_id}, #{title}, #{place}, #{use_note}, #{use_name}, #{total}, #{item_name}, #{content}, #{qty}, #{price}, #{amount}, #{tax}, #{payment_type}, #{payment_type_detail}, COALESCE( STR_TO_DATE(#{request_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), STR_TO_DATE(#{request_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i'), STR_TO_DATE(#{request_dt}, '%Y-%m-%d') ), #{account_number}, #{biz_no}, #{account_name} )
INSERT INTO tb_electronic_payment_file_management ( payment_id, image_order, image_path, image_name ) VALUES ( #{payment_id}, #{image_order}, #{image_path}, #{image_name} )

INSERT INTO tb_headoffice_purchase_request ( payment_id, item_name, qty, price, use_note, use_name, link, note, buy_yn, payment_note ) VALUES
( #{item.payment_id}, #{item.item_name}, #{item.qty}, #{item.price}, #{item.use_note}, #{item.use_name}, #{item.link}, #{item.note}, #{item.buy_yn}, #{item.payment_note} )
mapper.select: SELECT department, CASE WHEN department = 0 THEN '대표실' WHEN department = 2 THEN '회계팀' WHEN department = 3 THEN '인사팀' WHEN department = 4 THEN '영업팀' WHEN department = 5 THEN '운영팀' ELSE '개발팀' END AS dept_name FROM tb_user WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND department not in (1,7) GROUP BY department ORDER BY department ASC;
SELECT user_id, user_name, department, position, join_dt, user_type FROM tb_user WHERE del_yn = 'N' AND department = #{department} ORDER BY position ASC

SELECT bc.idx, DATE_FORMAT(bc.start_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS start_date, DATE_FORMAT(bc.end_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS end_date, bc.content, bc.type, bc.team_code, bc.del_yn, bc.update_dt, DATE_FORMAT(bc.reg_dt, '%Y-%m-%d') AS reg_dt, bc.user_id, bc.account_id, IFNULL(a.account_name, '') AS account_name, bc.reg_user_id, u.user_name FROM tb_business_calendar bc JOIN tb_user u ON u.user_id = bc.user_id LEFT JOIN tb_account a ON TRIM(CAST(a.account_id AS CHAR)) = TRIM(CAST(bc.account_id AS CHAR)) WHERE DATE_FORMAT(bc.start_date, '%Y-%m') = CONCAT(#{year}, '-', #{month}) AND DATE_FORMAT(bc.end_date, '%Y-%m') = CONCAT(#{year}, '-', #{month}) ORDER BY bc.start_date ASC
